verdict.answer_first: B states the command immediately: "Use `-X POST`..."; A starts with a framing sentence before the command: "you need three things".
verdict.decisiveness: B gives one core pattern plus fewer branches; A expands into "Useful variations," jq, status handling, and a final specific-endpoint CTA, so it feels more like a survey.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because the first code block is the answer and the notes stay short; A has more edge cases that dilute the simple task.
